outputs.description: IP address AbuseIPDB.IP.AbuseConfidenceScore Confidence score fetched from AbuseIPDB
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.Address

outputs.description: The number of times this address has been reported AbuseIPDB.IP.Geo.Country Country associated with this IP Address
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.TotalReports

outputs.description: Country code associated with this IP Address AbuseIPDB.IP.Hostnames The hostame(s) of the IP address.
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.Geo.CountryCode

outputs.description: The version of the IP address. AbuseIPDB.IP.IsPublic Is the IP address public.
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.IpVersion

outputs.description: Is the IP address a Tor IP. AbuseIPDB.IP.IsWhitelisted Is the IP address whitelisted.
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.IsTor

outputs.description: When the IP address was last reported. AbuseIPDB.IP.NumDistinctUsers The distinct number of users.
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.LastReportedAt

outputs.description: Reports summary (for "verbose" reports) DBotScore.Score Analysis score
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.Address.Reports

outputs.description: Vendor name (AbuseIPDB) DBotScore.Indicator The IP address
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: The type (ip) AbuseIPDB.IP.Malicious.Vendor The vendor that determined this IP address to be malicious
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The Detections that led to the verdict AbuseIPDB.IP.UsageType Usage type of the IP.
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.Malicious.Detections
